idea-plugin.name: Chiperka
idea-plugin.description:
Chiperka

First-class IDE integration for Chiperka — a declarative, YAML-based API & integration test runner with built-in Docker orchestration.

Define services, HTTP requests, and assertions in .chiperka files and run them with a single click directly from the editor.

Features

  • Gutter play buttons — Run individual tests or entire suites with one click
  • Test Runner integration — Results displayed in the built-in Test Runner tree with pass/fail status, duration, and diff viewer for assertion failures
  • Source navigation — Click a test in the Test Runner to jump to its definition in the .chiperka file
  • Run configurations — Full configuration UI with test file, filter, tags, preset, and additional arguments
  • Multiple execution modes — Local, Docker (exec/run), and Docker Compose (exec/run)
  • Cloud mode — Run tests on a remote Chiperka cloud server (configured via chiperka.yaml)
  • JSON Schema validation — Autocompletion and validation for .chiperka test files and .chiperka/chiperka.yaml config files
  • Structure view — Navigate suite > tests > sections (services, setup, execution, assertions)
  • Custom file icon — .chiperka files are instantly recognizable in the project tree
  • New file template — New > Chiperka Specification creates a test or service .chiperka file from a template
  • Context menu — Right-click folders or files to run Chiperka tests

Getting started

  1. Install the plugin and open a project that contains .chiperka test files
  2. Configure the Chiperka executable path in Settings > Tools > Chiperka
  3. Click the play button in the gutter next to a test name to run it

Supported IDEs

PhpStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, GoLand, PyCharm, and other JetBrains IDEs (2025.1+).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Gutter play buttons for suites and individual tests
  • Test Runner integration with pass/fail status, duration, and diff viewer
  • Source navigation from Test Runner to .chiperka file
  • Run configurations with Local, Docker, and Docker Compose execution modes
  • Cloud mode support
  • JSON Schema validation and autocompletion for .chiperka and .chiperka/chiperka.yaml
  • Structure view for .chiperka files
  • Custom file icon and file type override
  • New file template and context menu action

action.description: Create a new Chiperka specification file (test or service)
